name: chain(X, i, s, PK.seed, ADRS)
label: Algorithm 5

inputs.name: X
inputs.description: n-byte input string to start the chain from

inputs.name: i
inputs.description: Start index of the chain, number of iterations already applied to X

inputs.name: s
inputs.description: Number of additional iterations of F to apply to X

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: ADRS
inputs.description: 32-byte address structure, type set to WOTS_HASH with layer, tree, key pair, and chain addresses set

outputs.name: tmp
outputs.description: n-byte result of applying F s times starting from X at index i

body_raw: for j from i to i + s - 1 do
